span.p:
Developer pushes to main
or runs ./devops/scripts/dev.sh up

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Stage 1: builder
python:3.12-slim
pip install requirements.txt

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Stage 2: production
COPY from builder
USER canary
EXPOSE 5001

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Start PostgreSQL
Run init-db scripts
Create app/sales/metrics schemas

cloudflared tunnel run canary-dev
Verify dev.growdirect.app/health

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Deploy Complete
Canary is live on :5001

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
DEPLOY FAILED
Show logs + container status
